name: Dominion Income Trust 1
analysis: DN1 has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$98.6208. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$98.5463 where 5 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$98.6208, stop A$94.3955, target A$100.5000. Risk/reward is 0.44:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
